Create a Java application using the Elide framework to build a RESTful API service that allows users to manage products in an inventory system. answer:
java;elide;
Framework Description: Elide is a Java library that allows you to easily build GraphQL or JSON API web services driven by JPA-annotated models. Elide supports two API forms. 
CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) API for reading and manipulating models. 
Analytic API for aggregating metrics over zero or more model attributes.
